subcodes.first_line: O World-Bestower, Pure Creator of the Universe, the resplendent world is heaven's radiance, O All-Merciful Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جهانبخش بخشنده جهان پاک یزدان است درخشنده جهان آسمان خدای مهربان جهان
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @connection between material and spiritual worlds
